result.text: Scanning... a family transport vessel. Occupants: {n:3-6}. Snack entropy: advanced. A juice box has achieved zero gravity. There's a sticker chart on the aft viewport. Analyze the chart, or scan the cargo?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

chart.text: The chart shows {n:4-9} gold stars for someone named {pick:Maddie|Leo|Juniper}. One star from a reward. Do we beam over an honorary star?

starred.text: Honorary star transmitted on a frequency only childhood hope can receive. Somewhere in that van, a small human feels inexplicably victorious today.

neutral.text: Wise. The star must be earned. The chart's integrity endures.

cargo.text: Cargo manifest: {n:2-6} scooters, one cooler, {pick:a diaper bag of infinite depth|folding chairs from three eras|a kite with a grudge}. A vessel prepared for anything.
